document_summary: Information about 'Modern Market Research' textbook by Dehuan Liu (Editor-in-Chief), published by Higher Education Press in June 2005. The textbook is part of the 'Tenth Five-Year Plan' National Planning Textbook for General Higher Education, representing official government recognition of the textbook's quality and importance.

snippets.reasoning: Designation as a National Planning Textbook under the Tenth Five-Year Plan represents official government recognition of Liu's textbook.

snippets.text: Dehuan Liu Editor- in- Chief Hao Shen Associate Editor- in- Chief
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Confirms Liu as Editor-in-Chief of Modern Market Research, a nationally recognized textbook.

snippets.text: It is a "Tenth Five- Year Plan" National Planning Textbook for General Higher Education. This book discusses the concept, proposition, assumption and operation process, and gives special attention to measurement and sampling. This book hits off the drawback of redundant economic contents but insufficient market survey practices in similar domestic textbooks. Instead, it introduces the latest progress of marketing research methods and of statistics.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Description of the textbook as a national planning textbook introducing latest marketing research methods, demonstrating Liu's scholarly contribution.
